name: Democrats.org
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: say NO to Trump's executive order
body:

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Trump=20Headquarters?=
subject: FW: Crafting the First 100 Days Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Friend — we’re preparing to send the first batch of responses over to the President but you haven’t completed the First 100 Days Survey. Don’t miss out on getting your opinion on President Trump’s agenda directly in front of him. Complete the First 100 Days Survey by 11:59 pm tonight to guarantee that your opinions are among the first that reach the President. Thanks, Trump Headquarters ----- FORWARDED MESSAGE ------- From: Donald J. Trump Subject: Crafting the First 100 Days Agenda Friend, On the first day of my presidency, I told the world that the forgotten men and women of America would be forgotten no more. I said that the transfer of power on January 20, 2017 wouldn’t just be from one political party to another, but from Washington, D.C. to YOU -- the American people. I mean it, Friend. Which is why I need you to step up and have a voice in your country again. Please take the First 100 Days Survey to ensure YOUR voice is included in our platform to Make America Great Again! The world is watching to see if the platform we delivered on the campaign trail will fix our country. This is your chance to help craft our plan for the first hundred days of our new government controlled by you, the American people. The success of our movement -- and the future of our country -- depends upon YOU. Please make it your priority to take the First 100 Days Survey now. >> Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States
TAKE THE SURVEY

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba4OvQHPPjCInWfaGZImDRMN6aaaaNSQxBMIW3D9a?p=6@x7x92~&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=i&2=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

Complete the First 100 Days Survey by 11:59 pm tonight to guarantee that your opinions are among the first that reach the President.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Team 314 Action
subject: (deleted)
body:
Friend --

On Tuesday, a National Park Service account tweeted facts about climate change. Hours later, they were deleted.

Trump is instituting a full lockdown of all the facts he "disagrees" with. There's no other way to put it. One of Trump's first orders as President was to ban all external communication from the EPA. And now, the _AP_ is reporting that all EPA data must "undergo review by political staff before public release."

**[Don't let Trump suppress the facts about climate change. Stand with 314 Action now »](https://act.myngp.com/el/1578312816702521344/9157252905118466048)**
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1578312816702521344/9157252905118466048)
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1578312816702521344/9157252905118466048)
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1578312816702521344/9157252905118466048)
---

Scientific facts are not political. By filtering peer-reviewed science through political review, the Trump administration is trying to suppress the facts they don't like and promote only the studies that further their own agenda. We can't let this happen.

**[Join 314 Action and help us hold climate deniers accountable»](https://act.myngp.com/el/1578312816702521344/9157252905118466048)**

Making sure our representatives use facts to make informed decisions is a crucial part of our democracy. We must hold these climate-deniers -- and fact-deniers -- accountable.

Thanks,

Team 314 Action
---
| Paid for by 314action.org
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1578312816702521344/9085195311080538112).

314action.org
410 1st St SE Suite 310
Washington, DC 20003

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: Mike Pence rallied to overturn Roe v. Wade today
body:
The Trump administration is dangerous for women
---
**The Trump-Pence administration is on track to be the most dangerous for women in history. Pitch in today to help Democrats fight back.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c73c/4067b0a/239957076/7e7b5900/271945484/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170127_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170127_dnc4_nd")**
Friend --

Today, Mike Pence became the first sitting vice president to address the "March for Life," an annual anti-choice rally in Washington, D.C.

He told the crowd, "Life is winning again in America." This is another one of this administration's trademark "alternative facts" -- their policies are going to lead to more abortions and more women dying from being denied life-saving health care. Period.

With this kind of ally in the White House, it's no wonder conservatives looking to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and roll back women's rights across the board are so fired up.

In its first week alone, we've seen the Trump-Pence administration and House Republicans:

* Reinstate the "global gag rule," banning federal funding for international organizations that even provide information about abortions to women.

* Pass a bill to make the Hyde Amendment -- which bans federal funds to pay for abortions or even subsidize them via private insurance, disproportionately affecting low-income women -- permanent law.

* Make moves to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which has helped millions of women by no longer allowing them to be discriminated against with higher premiums than men and made life-saving preventative care more accessible.

This is shaping up to be the most dangerous administration for women in history -- and we're only a week in. Pitch in today to help Democrats fight back.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c73c/4067b0a/239957076/7e7b5f96/271945484/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170127_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170127_dnc4_nd")

[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c73c/4067b0a/239957076/7e7b5f92/271945484/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170127_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170127_dnc4_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c73c/4067b0a/239957076/7e7b5f90/271945484/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170127_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170127_dnc4_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c73c/4067b0a/239957076/7e7b5f9e/271945484/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170127_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170127_dnc4_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c73c/4067b0a/239957076/7e7b590a/271945484/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170127_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170127_dnc4_nd")

If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c73c/4067b0a/239957076/7e7b5908/271945484/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170127_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170127_dnc4_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c73c/4067b0a/239957076/7e7b5916/271945484/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170127_dnc4_nd&source=em_20170127_dnc4_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

He told the crowd, "Life is winning again in America." This is another one of this administration's trademark "alternative facts" -- their policies are going to lead to more abortions and more women dying from being denied life-saving health care. Period. With this kind of ally in the White House, it's no wonder conservatives looking to overturn Roe v. Wade and roll back women's rights across the board are so fired up. In its first week alone, we've seen the Trump-Pence administration and House Republicans: Reinstate the "global gag rule," banning federal funding for international organizations that even provide information about abortions to women. Pass a bill to make the Hyde Amendment -- which bans federal funds to pay for abortions or even subsidize them via private insurance, disproportionately affecting low-income women -- permanent law. Make moves to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which has helped millions of women by no longer allowing them to be discriminated against with higher premiums than men and made life-saving preventative care more accessible. This is shaping up to be the most dangerous administration for women in history -- and we're only a week in. Pitch in today to help Democrats fight back. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" "" ** Thanks, The Democrats Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Add your name: Don't confirm Betsy DeVos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0f/2a380d31/142624f3/fed924/1658304851/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0f/2a380d31/142624f3/fed924/1658304851/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
It's clear, everyone. Donald Trump's pick for Secretary of Education, corporate billionaire Betsy DeVos, is unfit to do the job.
Under questioning from Senator Hassan, Mrs. DeVos admitted that she was confused about whether the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act was a federal law, and she has no understanding of the student loan programs hundreds of thousands of Americans are saddled with.
**We need a Secretary of Education who is committed to protecting our students, not an out-of-touch billionaire.[Please, add your name to tell the Senate not to confirm Betsy DeVos.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0f/2a380d31/142624f3/fed925/1658304851/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/standagainstdevos?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201701_devos")**
Mrs. DeVos's lack of qualification doesn't stop there. She has a track record of undermining investments in public education by supporting voucher programs that would divert taxpayer funds to private schools without accountability requirements.
Our students, teachers, and families deserve a Secretary of Education who is committed to ensuring that everyone can receive a safe, quality education, not just those at the top.
[**Join Senator Hassan and tell the Senate that Betsy DeVos is unfit to serve as our Secretary of Education.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0f/2a380d31/142624f3/fed925/1658304851/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/standagainstdevos?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201701_devos")
Thanks for speaking up,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0f/2a380d31/142624f3/fed926/1658304851/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDEyN19kZXZvc2phX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170127_devosja_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0f/2a380d31/142624f3/fed927/1658304851/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**

We need a Secretary of Education who is committed to protecting our students, not an out-of-touch billionaire. "" Mrs. DeVos's lack of qualification doesn't stop there. name: Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
subject: President Trump's First Week
body:
| | [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan27letterin3&n=1)
---
### [ ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan27letterin3&n=2)
---
Peter, Our Campaign Committee, Donald J. Trump for President, Inc., is still here. We will act as a beacon for our Movement of hardworking patriots who delivered a historic victory this November. President Trump is wasting no time making America great again. America First is in action, and you deserve to know how hard the President is working for you. Here is a look at the President's First Week:
* * *
THIS WEEK
* * *
* **Easing Regulatory Burdens

** Shortly after being sworn in, President Trump ordered federal agencies to ease the "regulatory burdens" of ObamaCare. Agencies are ordered to "waive, defer, grant exemptions from, or delay the implementation of any provision or requirement" of Obamacare in hopes that this order will lower the burden on individuals, families and patients as the President and the Congress work on a permanent solution to Obamacare.

* **Withdrawing from TPP

** The President wasted no time in ending the United States support of the disastrous TPP trade deal by withdrawing our country from it on Monday. President Trump called the move, "a great thing for the American workers."

* **Spurring American Jobs**

On Tuesday, President Trump re-opened the door for the Keystone and Dakota Access pipeline to be built with an executive order. Also included were related orders that would speed up the timeline on the project by streamlining the permitting process and cut through more government red tape.

* **Securing Our Borders

** President Trump is moving forward with several items that will secure our borders and keep Americans safe! He plans on stripping federal grant money to dangerous sanctuary cities, hiring 5,000 more Border Patrol agents, ending "catch-and-release" policies for illegal immigrants, and reinstating local and state immigration enforcement partnerships.

* * *
THE WEEK AHEAD
* * *
* **Remembering our Allies

** Today, British Prime Minister Theresa May will meet with President Trump. Prime Minister May appears optimistic about the visit saying, "So as we rediscover our confidence together -- as you renew your nation just as we renew ours -- we have the opportunity -- indeed the responsibility -- to renew the special relationship for this new age. We have the opportunity to lead, together, again."

* **Protecting the Constitution

** Next Thursday President Trump is slated to announce his choice to fill the vacancy left on the Supreme Court after the loss of Justice Antonin Scalia last February. This is a highly anticipated announcement, as this new justice will shape the future of our nation by weighing into decisions that have reached the highest court.

* * *
We look forward to working with all of our supporters. Together, our Movement is just getting started and we can Make America Great Again! Team Trump-Pence [P.S. Don't forget there is still time to pick something up to commemorate President Trump's historic victory by visiting our Inauguration store while supplies last!](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Finauguration&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan27letterin3&n=3) [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Finauguration&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan27letterin3&n=4)
---
| | [
twitter ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FTeamTrump&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan27letterin3&n=5)
---
| [
facebook ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fofficialteamtrump%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan27letterin3&n=6)

instagram ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Frealdonaldtrump%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan27letterin3&n=7)

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: One. Week.
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7185/24c69fd9/fa2443a6/18e1d3a0/194005729/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all&source=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all")
---

Peter,

We're only one week into the Trump presidency, and women's access to health care is under an all-out attack.

President Trump's first executive order? A command to federal agencies to weaken the Affordable Care Act in any way possible.

His next round included reinstating the global gag rule, which prevents international health organizations that receive U.S. aid for everything from HIV to Zika from even mentioning abortion as an option to their patients. If they do, they'll lose their funding.

**[Now more than ever, we can't back down from fighting to protect a woman's right to control her own body. Donate $3 to the Stop Trump Fund today to help elect pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7185/24c69fd9/fa2443a6/18e1d3a1/194005729/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170127_email_OneWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Now+more+than+ever+we+cant+back+down+fro&utm_campaign=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all&source=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all")**

It's not just choice that's under attack from Donald Trump.

In the past week, he's signed orders to build a wall along our border with Mexico and target sanctuary cities. He's announced plans to block refugees and restrict immigration from Muslim-majority countries.

And he continues to double down on his claims of massive voter fraud -- with zero evidence. He's casting doubt over the foundation of our democracy with his reckless pride.

Millions of us marched last weekend to send a message that we will defend our progressive values. We have to raise our voices and stand strong against Trump's regressive, anti-choice, xenophobic policies.

**Donate $3 to our Stop Trump Fund if you're committed to fighting back:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Week-One](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7185/24c69fd9/fa2443a6/18e1d3a2/194005729/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170127_email_OneWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWeekOne&utm_campaign=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all&source=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all")**

Thank you,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7185/24c69fd9/fa2443a6/18e1d3a3/194005729/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170127_email_OneWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all&source=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7185/24c69fd9/fa2443a6/18e1d3dc/194005729/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all&source=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7185/24c69fd9/fa2443a6/18e1d3dd/194005729/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all&source=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7185/24c69fd9/fa2443a6/18e1d3de/194005729/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all&source=WQEFE135N_digital_email_20170127_OneWeek_n-all").
